summary: Iteration 16 testing complete. All NEW features tested: NIUM Multi-Strategy Auth Discovery (6 strategies across 3 base URLs), Multi-version API retry (v3→v4→v2→v1), Background Scheduler (price alerts 60s, rate limiter 300s, NIUM auth 1800s). 13/13 backend tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: NIUM Auth Discovery working correctly - found x-api-key@gateway.nium.com as active strategy
All 6 strategies tested: x-api-key and bearer on api.nium.com, sandbox.nium.com, gateway.nium.com
Multi-version API retry (v3→v4→v2→v1) working - returns enriched error with troubleshooting steps
Background scheduler running with 3 periodic tasks: PriceAlerts(60s), RateLimiterCleanup(300s), NiumAuthRefresh(1800s)
NIUM create-customer returns 404 'Configuration not found for templateId' - this is NIUM Portal configuration (NOT a code bug)
Price alerts CRUD working correctly with background auto-checking
Browser push polling endpoint working for authenticated users
seed_data_creation: Created test price alert (BTC above 65000 EUR) - cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 features working: 1) NIUM Multi-Strategy Auth Discovery at /api/nium-onboarding/auth-discovery-status shows all 6 strategies tested, active strategy is x-api-key@gateway.nium.com. 2) POST /api/nium-onboarding/auth-discovery-reset forces re-discovery. 3) POST /api/nium-onboarding/create-customer tries v3,v4,v2,v1 automatically and returns enriched error with troubleshooting steps. 4) Background scheduler running with PriceAlerts(60s), RateLimiterCleanup(300s), NiumAuthRefresh(1800s). 5) NIUM returns real 404 'Configuration not found for templateId' - account needs template setup in NIUM Portal.

nium_auth_discovery.GET /api/nium-onboarding/auth-discovery-: PASS - Returns active_strategy, all_strategies (6), last_discovery, discovery_in_progress
nium_auth_discovery.POST /api/nium-onboarding/auth-discovery: PASS - Forces re-discovery and returns new active strategy
nium_auth_discovery.GET /api/nium-onboarding/available-metho: PASS - Returns auto_discovery=enabled with 4 KYC modes

nium_onboarding.POST /api/nium-onboarding/create-custome: PASS - Tries v3,v4,v2,v1 automatically, returns 404 with enriched error (templateId missing in NIUM Portal)

price_alerts.POST /api/alerts/create: PASS - Creates price alert with asset, condition, threshold
price_alerts.GET /api/alerts: PASS - Lists user's alerts with active_count
price_alerts.POST /api/alerts/check: PASS - Background task to check and trigger alerts (no auth required)

browser_push.GET /api/browser-push/pending: PASS - Returns pending push notifications for authenticated user
browser_push.POST /api/browser-push/delivered: PASS - Marks all pending pushes as delivered

background_scheduler.scheduler_running: PASS - Verified via logs: PriceAlerts(60s), RateLimiterCleanup(300s), NiumAuthRefresh(1800s)

mocked_apis.note: NIUM returns real 404 'Configuration not found for templateId' - account needs template setup in NIUM Portal. This is EXPECTED and intentional - NO simulation.
